subcodes.first_line: O Raḥím! Thy letter hath reached the presence of the Generous Lord. Praised be God that, by His grace, thou hast attained the Holy Court
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای رحیم کتابت در محضر رب کریم حاضر الحمد لله از فضل حق بساحت اقدس فائز شدی
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @consolation and comfort, @personal instructions, @love of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
